text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove has WON the Shuka Sho! Incredible!
And with this victory...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove is the Triple Tiara champion! We've
just witnessed the birth of an unbeatable empress!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text:
A-amazing! I'm so glad I came today! You're the
best, Air Groove! Congrats!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Ohhh, Air Groove! You were so great!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Em-press! Em-press! Em-press! Em-press!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Everyone here at Kyoto Racecourse has erupted
in cheers for the Empress! We have witnessed
history today, folks! Give it up for Air Groove!
Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: We've achieved something truly great here today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh. I believe I told you I would do your hard
work justice.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You've been great too. Thanks again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With cheers roaring behind us, we begin to make
our way back to the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on winning the Shuka Sho! I, um,
just wanted to say something to you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Watching you take on the Triple Tiara...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It really changed me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove... You are my ideal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you... for always being there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to work tirelessly to catch up with you.
I'm going to get closer with each passing day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Until eventually... I surpass you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't stop chasing after me. I look forward to the
day we meet on the track.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: R-right!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Air Groove. And... thank you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh. She's matured quite a bit.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That I did. But I'm not satisfied yet.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Being someone's ideal is a lifelong task. For the
sake of all Umamusume who look up to me...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I need to aim for even greater heights and grow
even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's why you're my trainer.
